articles.description: Blog articles published on the website

title.description: Article title, displayed as the page heading and in article list cards

slug.description: URL-friendly identifier used in the article URL (e.g. 'my-article'). Must be set manually when creating via API — use lowercase, hyphens instead of spaces, no special characters

content.description: Article body in Markdown, rendered on the article detail page via react-markdown

excerpt.description: Short plain-text summary shown in article list cards and used for meta description, keep under 200 chars

image.description: Cover image displayed at the top of the article and as thumbnail in lists. Use upload_media first to get a media ID, then pass it here

published_date.description: Publication date in YYYY-MM-DD format, displayed on the article page
